verdict: Strong return on spend, but the paused campaign and zero calls signal lost momentum that needs urgent action.
diagnosis: Campaign is paused with only 2 leads and zero phone calls this period, despite $5,198 in purchase value tied to $1,217 spend.

signals.headline: Campaign paused mid-period
signals.detail: The search campaign targeting seniors 45-65+ is currently paused, halting any new lead flow from paid search.

signals.headline: Only 2 leads in 28 days
signals.detail: Lead volume is too thin to judge performance. Cost per lead of $12 looks strong but sits on a tiny sample.

signals.headline: 8 purchases worth $5,198
signals.detail: Sales tied to ads returned about $4.30 for every $1 spent. The funnel works when traffic flows.

signals.headline: Zero phone calls from Google profile
signals.detail: No call clicks this period despite a medical group listing. Seniors prefer to call. This is a major leak.

signals.headline: Pipeline value sitting at $0
signals.detail: Open opportunities in the CRM show no monetary value attached. Sales follow-up or deal tracking needs attention.

recommendations.title: Reactivate the paused search campaign
recommendations.detail: Consider turning the BWS search campaign back on. Every paused day loses high-intent senior traffic. Start with a small daily cap to retest before scaling.

recommendations.title: Fix the phone call gap on Google profile
recommendations.detail: Zero call clicks for a medical group serving seniors is unusual. Test a click-to-call button, verify the phone number displays correctly, and add call tracking.

recommendations.title: Run more leads before judging cost per lead
recommendations.detail: Two leads is not a real signal. Worth running 30-60 more days at current settings to confirm the $12 cost per lead holds up.
